default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AfterShoot's content strategy and contract terms with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AfterShoot seeks to reduce scope and increase efficiency in their content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Request for a 6-month contract post-pilot instead of 12 months due to internal changes](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Non-branded search (organic/paid) currently has minimal impact on AfterShoot's bottom line](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)
  - [AfterShoot's primary marketing channels: social media, brand campaigns, referrals, partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Reduce scope and increase efficiency by focusing on fewer content categories](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Team feeling overwhelmed with multiple programs and content types](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [New hire (Minus) joining to support growth efforts](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Hiring for Head of Content position to strengthen content function](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Contract Terms Discussion

  - [Current contract: 12-month term (including 3-month pilot) starting Feb 24, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [AfterShoot proposing 6-month term post-pilot (effectively 9 months total)](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Rationale: Internal changes, team restructuring, potential new product launch](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Kyle to discuss flexibility with GrowthX leadership](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### AfterShoot's Marketing Mix

  - [Social media (organic + paid): Major focus, very active on Instagram and Facebook](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
  - [Brand campaigns: Events, sponsorships (e.g., $1M fund for event organizers)](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Referrals/word-of-mouth: Strong due to product's impact](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Partnerships: Influencers and ambassadors creating promotional content](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Search (organic + paid): Minimal impact, 90% branded searches](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=616.0)

### Video Content Challenges

  - [Struggle to scale long-form video content production](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Tried in-house production (team too busy) and agency production (lack of subject expertise)](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)
  - [Currently testing having video creators on payroll as spokespersons](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Continued investment in video, but workflow still a work in progress](https://fathom.video/share/eXg3i3v_WM9CshzwYPiSx5xR8YxzxxCB?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)

### Future Opportunities
